concept: Unity / The Grounded Essence of the Whole
description: The state of being undivided and interconnected. It is not uniformity, but the coming together of diverse elements into a coherent whole while maintaining their unique essence.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'tho' (a whole system), 'ma' (grounded presence), and 'i' (essence). The word's structure suggests 'the essence of a grounded whole.' This frames unity as a tangible, grounded state where individual essences (`i`) contribute to a larger system (`tho`).
